pages.title: Making Patterns
pages.text: $(bold)Making a pattern:$()$(li)Create a Pattern Board$(li)Use the Pattern Creation Station$(li)Choose the required part design$(p)The station consumes the configured pattern material and returns that pattern.$(p)The screwdriver design is reserved compatibility content.

pages.title: Pattern Racks
pages.text: Pattern Racks store designs beside the workshop.$(p)$(bold)At the forge:$()$(li)Select a stored pattern$(li)Supply its material$(li)Heat it when required$(li)Strike with a sufficient hammer$(p)JEI lists material count, hit count, and minimum hammer tier.
